title: Browser Tab Opened Event Payload
description: Schema for the payload of browser.tab_opened events tracking new tab creation

tabId.description: Unique identifier for the new tab

windowId.description: Identifier for the browser window containing the tab

host.description: Hostname of the initial page loaded in the tab

pathHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the URL path for privacy-preserving tracking

openerTabId.description: ID of the tab that opened this tab (if applicable)

openerHost.description: Hostname of the page that triggered the new tab

index.description: Position of the tab in the tab strip

isNewTabPage.description: Whether this is a new tab page

windowTabCount.description: Total number of tabs in the window after opening

groupId.description: Tab group ID if the tab belongs to a group

incognito.description: Whether the tab was opened in incognito/private mode
